raw.subject: Your Albany page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed you have a heartwarming post about adopting out pets to a rescue organization. But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for potential clients to find you and book services.

I sketched a simple page idea that could showcase your grooming services, share photos of happy pets, and include a clear call-to-action for booking appointments.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/doggy-stylez-grooming-boutique-albany

I'd love to discuss how a website can help you grow your pet grooming business in Albany. As a local business, a flat fee can make it accessible to get started.
